div.p: Send shipments, monitor active cargo, and respond quickly to quoted or rejected offers.
Manage shipments, quotations, track deliveries — all from one place.

t.div: There are currently no shipments for your account.

textarea.name: message
textarea.placeholder: Write your reply to operations team...

t.div: No replies yet. Start by sending your first message above.
There are currently no quotations for your account.

t.t-if: quotation.state in ['draft', 'quoted'] and quotation.line_ids and quotation.total_amount > 0

a.onclick: return confirm('Are you sure you want to accept this quotation?');

t.t-if: quotation.state in ['draft', 'quoted'] and (not quotation.line_ids or quotation.total_amount == 0)
t.div: Awaiting Pricing: This quotation is being reviewed by our team. You will be notified once pricing is available.

div.p: Please provide a reason for rejecting this quotation (optional):

textarea.name: reason
textarea.placeholder: e.g., Price too high, delivery time not suitable...

div.div: Your feedback helps us improve our service.

t.div: Your notification preferences have been saved successfully.

div.label: Quotation Sent - Receive notifications when a new quotation is sent to you
Booking Confirmed - Receive notifications when your booking is confirmed
Shipment Booked - Receive notifications when shipment is booked
Shipment Departed - Receive notifications when shipment departs
Shipment In Transit - Receive notifications for transit updates
Shipment Arrived - Receive notifications when shipment arrives at destination
Shipment Delivered - Receive notifications when shipment is delivered
Document Uploaded - Receive notifications when new documents are available

div.small: Choose how often you want to receive notifications

div.p: Stay informed about your shipments with our notification system. You can customize which events trigger notifications and how often you receive them.

ul.li: Real-time: Instant notifications as events occur
Daily Digest: Summary of all events once per day
Weekly Digest: Summary of all events once per week

div.p: Fill out the form below and we'll send you a quote within 24 hours.
Our team will review your request and send you a detailed quotation within 24 hours.
